company_context: Build AI Cloud with Kubernetes & Open Source IS JOINING Building and Delivering Custom Software Together Sharing the same values and passion for commitment, trust and excellence, we are excited to share that InfraCloud has joined the Improving brand! While our name may be different now, our focus and dedication will remain unchanged. Read More Build AI Cloud with Kubernetes & Open Source We help build GPU Cloud, modernize applications and infrastructure with our expertise in cloud native technologies. Trusted by leading companies Cloud Native Revolution Cloud Native Revolution We have modernized the way applications, data lakes & ML models are built & deployed by the world’s leading organizations. From retail organizations to real-time ad bidding platforms, our engineers combine knowledge, experience, and innovation to achieve measurable results with every project. Read Customer Stories -> AI Infrastructure with Cloud Native & Open Source Learn how our experts can help you modernize cloud infrastructure, and truly be cloud native. GPU Cloud Cloud Native Apps Build GPU Cloud Build an AI Cloud with GPUs or other processing units & open source technologies. Our expertise in bare metal provisioning with Tinkerbell , private cloud with OpenStack and cloud native technologies such as Kubernetes, Prometheus, and Kubeflow have enabled organizations to build private/public GPU cloud. Learn More -> CI/CD for Code, Data & Models Setting up the right source code practices & a way to continuously integrate and deliver code along with data & models is crucial for the success of an AI platform. We have coached on practices that work & built pipelines for organizations to deliver business goals to production seamlessly. Learn More -> Workflow Orchestration Orchestrating the workflows of data pipelines and executing them at scale is crucial to an AI platform. We build, deploy, and scale workflow orchestration systems on scalable infrastructure to execute them at the speed of business needs. Learn More -> Model Registry & Metadata Stores A distributed & stable model registry needed to serve the right model when an application is needed is crucial for an AI platform that is global in nature. It is also crucial to capture the right metadata of models in a registry or separate database, depending on business needs. Learn More -> Feature Stores A feature store that can serve the needs of model training as well as in the prediction request path is needed for the AI platform to deliver value to both sets of customers successfully. We build & deploy these on right infrastructure based on the needs of the business. Learn More -> Model Serving Serving models to end users in request path, with accuracy & low latency not only improves user experience but also business value. We deploy and configure the serving components to deliver to users. Learn More -> Model Observability & Feedback Loops Redirecting requests to the right model and observing the accuracy of results & mode

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm a Sales Development Representative at DeepData AI. We specialize in providing data processing solutions to businesses like yours. I came across your company, Improving, and was impressed with the work you're doing in cloud native technologies and AI infrastructure. Can you tell me a little bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We do have some complex data pipelines to manage, but we're currently using a solution from DataFlow Solutions. It's been working okay for us so far. What makes DeepData AI different from what we're already using?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question. Our solution is built on top of Kubernetes and Open Source technologies, which allows for greater scalability and flexibility. We've also developed a proprietary algorithm that can handle large volumes of data much faster than traditional solutions. I'd love to schedule a demo to show you how it works. Would you be available for a call next week?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's necessary. We're pretty locked into our contract with DataFlow Solutions for the next 18 months. Plus, I'm not sure our team would be ready to integrate a new solution anytime soon. We're in the middle of a major project and can't afford to disrupt our workflow. What kind of support do you offer for integration and implementation?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns. We do offer comprehensive support for integration and implementation, including dedicated engineers and a thorough onboarding process. We've also developed a number of tools and resources to help make the transition as smooth as possible. As for the contract, I understand that it can be a challenge to switch vendors mid-contract. However, I'd like to discuss potential cost savings and ROI that our solution could bring to your business. Can I send over some case studies and we can discuss further?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I don't think it would be worth exploring at this time. Our contract with DataFlow Solutions is pretty comprehensive and includes a lot of customized features that are specific to our business. I'm not sure DeepData AI could match that level of customization, and even if you could, I'm not sure it would be worth the cost and disruption to our business. We're trying to keep our IT spend under control and I just don't see the ROI on switching vendors right now.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns about customization and ROI. However, I'd like to propose a pilot project to demonstrate the value of our solution and show how it can be tailored to your specific needs. This would allow us to work together to identify areas where our solution can bring the most benefit and provide a clear understanding of the costs and benefits involved.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the proposal, but I'm afraid we're not interested in pursuing a pilot project at this time. As I mentioned earlier, we're locked into a contract with DataFlow Solutions and we're not looking to make any changes to our data processing infrastructure for the foreseeable future. Thank you for reaching out, but I think we'll have to decline your offer.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Integration
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's concerns about integration and customization earlier in the conversation to potentially overcome the objections. Sentiment: Neutral

parsed.feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's concerns about integration and customization earlier in the conversation to potentially overcome the objections. Sentiment: Neutral
